# Casa Samaya
> Boutique beachfront hotel in Weligama, Sri Lanka. Stay, eat, and reconnect.

## Hotel
- [Rooms & Suites](https://casasamaya.com/rooms.html): Four room types with ocean and garden views
- [Special Offers](https://casasamaya.com/offers.html): Extended stays, surf, and wellness packages

## Restaurant
- [Café Samaya](https://casasamaya.com/restaurant.html): Beachfront restaurant serving Sri Lankan and international cuisine

## Wellness
- [Calma Samaya Yoga](https://casasamaya.com/wellness.html): Rooftop yoga, breathwork, and meditation
- [Spa & Massage](https://casasamaya.com/massage.html): Therapeutic massages and spa treatments

## Discover
- [Experiences](https://casasamaya.com/experiences.html): Surfing, whale watching, safaris, and cultural tours
- [Weligama Guide](https://casasamaya.com/weligama.html): Local guide to the southern coast

## About
- [Our Vision](https://casasamaya.com/vision.html): Philosophy and meaning behind Samaya
- [Contact](https://casasamaya.com/contact.html): Address, phone, email, and booking

## Key Facts
- Location: Weligama, Sri Lanka (southern coast)
- Address: Kanakamage Watha, Weligama By Pass Rd, 81700
- Phone: +94 77 339 5212
- Email: welcome@casasamaya.com
- Check-in: 3 PM / Check-out: 11 AM
